title: Imidazole compounds, process for the synthesis and uses thereof
abstract: The present invention relates to novel pharmaceutical agents and the process of preparation thereof. The present invention discloses compounds of general formula I, and the process of their preparation. The compounds of the invention are useful in the treatment and prevention of diseases related to cellular stress mediated immune deregulation and loss of homeostasis also including autoimmune diseases, cancers, metabolic, dermatological, cardiovascular and neurodegenerative diseases.
claims: 1. A pharmaceutical compound of formula I:
